question: How long do I have to return an item?
response: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery, as long as they are unused and in their original packaging.

question: How do I start a return?
response: Start a return from the Orders section of your account: select the item and choose 'Return'. We'll email you a prepaid shipping label.

question: How long do refunds take?
response: Once we receive your returned item, your refund is issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

question: How will I receive my refund?
response: Refunds are always issued to the original payment method used for the purchase.

question: Why does my refund need review?
response: Refunds above 500 euros require manual approval by a support specialist and may take slightly longer to process.

question: How much does shipping cost?
response: Standard shipping is free on orders over 50 euros; otherwise it is 4.99 euros. Express shipping is 9.99 euros.

question: How long does delivery take?
response: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days and express delivery arrives in 1-2 business days. We currently ship within the EU only.

question: How do I track my order?
response: When your order ships, we email you a tracking link. You can also find it in the Orders section of your account.

question: What does the warranty cover?
response: All products include a 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. It does not cover accidental damage or normal wear and tear.

question: How do I make a warranty claim?
response: Contact support with your order number and a description of the defect, and we will arrange a repair or replacement.

question: Can I cancel my order?
response: You can cancel an order within 1 hour of placing it, or any time before it ships, from the Orders section of your account.

question: Can I change my order after placing it?
response: You can change the items or shipping address any time before the order ships. After it ships, please use the return process.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
response: We accept major credit and debit cards as well as PayPal.
